rules.name: End product line positive quantity
rules.description: When isEndProduct is true, movementQuantity must be positive (produced output).
rules.errorMessage: End product line must have a positive movement quantity.

rules.name: Component line negative quantity
rules.description: When isEndProduct is false, movementQuantity must be negative (consumed input).
rules.errorMessage: Component line must have a negative movement quantity (consumed).

rules.name: Production must have exactly one end product line
rules.description: When completing a production order, there must be exactly one line with isEndProduct = true.
rules.errorMessage: A production order must have exactly one end product line.

rules.name: Production must have at least one component line
rules.description: When completing a production order, there must be at least one component (non-end-product) line.
rules.errorMessage: A production order must have at least one component line.

rules.name: End product quantity matches header
rules.description: The end product line movementQuantity must match the header productionQuantity.
rules.errorMessage: End product line quantity must match the production order quantity.
